title: FDA/USDA Acceptable Floor Solutions - Elite South Texas
content:
FDA/USDA Acceptable
The food and pharmaceutical industries have specific guidelines that must be adhered to, as set forth by the FDA/USDA
*
, CFIA, EU standards and other regulatory agencies. These include non-porous, seamless antimicrobial coatings which may not contain certain chemicals and additives.
Aside from typical concerns regarding germs, viruses, bacterial growth and safety hazards, the food processing industry may run into problems such as corrosion prevention and consistent peeling of flooring and vertical surfaces.
*
Unlike the EU, the FDA and USDA does not certify resinous coating manufacturers compliance of their standards.
Contact an Elite South Texas technical representative for more details.
